privileged_info_summary: The task involves CSS live prototyping on example.com, a real IANA public example domain. The target website contains an h1 heading 'Example Domain', paragraphs, and links. All CSS color values in metadata are correct per W3C CSS Color Module Level 3: aliceblue (#f0f8ff / rgb(240,248,255)), darkblue (#00008b / rgb(0,0,139)), magenta (#ff00ff / rgb(255,0,255)), and fuchsia (identical alias to magenta), white (#ffffff / rgb(255,255,255)). Standard CSS properties (text-align: center, text-decoration: underline, font-family: monospace) are correctly specified. Agent must apply these styles via DevTools and create two output files: a screenshot mockup and a CSS file with the rules.
